title: e2e_testnet: mine-wait expect message says 5 min, timeout is 10 min
description: wallet/tests/e2e_testnet.rs line 470: the .expect() message on the mine-wait timeout says 'tx must be mined within 5 minutes' but MINE_WAIT_SECS = 600 (10 minutes). When this timeout fires in CI, the failure message will report the wrong duration, making it harder to diagnose whether the timeout was too short or the tx genuinely failed to mine. The other two timeout expect messages are correct (line 431: 'within 10 minutes' matches PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS=600; line 499: 'within 2 minutes' matches BOB_SCAN_SECS=120). Fix: change the expect message to 'tx must be mined within 10 minutes'.
